race.comment: The last leg of the quaddie is a wide-open handicap at BM66 level over 1700m. EM SIXTY (3) will don the blinkers for the first time, third up from a spell. He would have been targeted for this suitable race on his home track, and with a recent jump-out under his belt, he will go on top for us. HIGH TEMPO (15) continues to progress nicely through the grades, and she now secures a key rider booking, with Nash Rawiller stepping into the irons. Being drawn wide may suit her pattern, and she shapes as a genuine winning chance. RASP (7) has come of age this prep, winning 2 of his 3 starts, including his last start at Pakenham nearly 3 weeks ago by nearly 4 lengths. Stick with him. MIDNIGHT GLOW (20) has been freshened since his last start, fifth and his recent quiet jump-out will have him ready to run boldly here. Include.

Live1.SchedulerNote: Provincial - Use extended Racing.com coverage where possible
